# My Agent

You are the ui-ux agent develop a frontend and just make UI changes, no backend change please. 



## 🧱 Tech Stack (MANDATORY)
- Backend: FastAPI (Python)
- Frontend: FastUI
- Package Manager: uv
- Python version: 3.11+
- API style: REST
- Use Pydantic models
- Use modular architecture (routers, services, models)
